gaps: No test covers the behavior when one earbud is placed into the charging case while both are connected and in use. Specifically, no test verifies that only the inserted earbud should disconnect while the other remains connected and functional.
No test covers earbud insertion into the charging case as a Bluetooth state transition scenario for TWS (True Wireless) earbuds like Voyager Free 60+ UC or Voyager Free 20.
No test covers the connection status display in the Poly Studio Mobile app when one earbud is removed from use and placed in the case (partial disconnect scenario).
No test covers audio output behavior (e.g., does audio continue on the remaining earbud, or does it stop entirely) when one earbud is placed in the charging case.
No test covers the scenario of re-inserting an earbud into the case and then removing it again to verify reconnection behavior of the single earbud.

generated_testcases.title: TC-BUD-DISCONNECT-001: Single earbud insertion into case — only inserted earbud disconnects, other remains connected
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC] → ensure both earbuds are connected (status shows 'Left earbud connected' and 'Right earbud connected')
2. Start playing audio (music or test tone) on the connected phone
3. Place the LEFT earbud into the charging case and close the lid
4. Observe the connection status in Poly Studio Mobile app → Device screen
5. Observe audio output from the RIGHT earbud
6. Remove the LEFT earbud from the charging case and open the lid
generated_testcases.expected: Only the LEFT earbud disconnects. The RIGHT earbud remains connected. Audio continues to play through the RIGHT earbud without interruption. The Poly Studio Mobile app shows 'Right earbud connected' and 'Left earbud disconnected' or similar partial connection state. When the LEFT earbud is removed from the case, it reconnects automatically and both earbuds show as connected.

generated_testcases.title: TC-BUD-DISCONNECT-002: Single earbud insertion into case — right earbud inserted, left remains active
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC] → confirm both earbuds are connected
2. Start a phone call or media playback
3. Place the RIGHT earbud into the charging case and close the lid
4. Observe connection status in Poly Studio Mobile app → Device screen
5. Observe audio output from the LEFT earbud
6. Remove the RIGHT earbud from the charging case
generated_testcases.expected: Only the RIGHT earbud disconnects. The LEFT earbud remains connected and continues to output audio. Poly Studio Mobile app shows 'Left earbud connected' and 'Right earbud disconnected'. When the RIGHT earbud is removed from the case, it reconnects automatically and both earbuds show as connected.

generated_testcases.title: TC-BUD-DISCONNECT-003: Both earbuds inserted simultaneously into case — full disconnect
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC] → confirm both earbuds are connected
2. Start media playback
3. Place BOTH earbuds into the charging case and close the lid
4. Observe connection status in Poly Studio Mobile app → Device screen
5. Observe audio output
6. Remove both earbuds from the charging case
generated_testcases.expected: Both earbuds disconnect from the phone. Audio stops. Poly Studio Mobile app shows 'No device connected' or 'Disconnected'. When both earbuds are removed from the case, they reconnect automatically and audio resumes.

generated_testcases.title: TC-BUD-DISCONNECT-004: Audio routing behavior — call in progress when one earbud is inserted into case
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC] → confirm both earbuds connected
2. Initiate a phone call from the connected phone
3. During the active call, place the LEFT earbud into the charging case and close the lid
4. Observe call audio behavior on the RIGHT earbud
5. Observe Poly Studio Mobile app connection status
6. Place the RIGHT earbud into the case as well
7. Remove both earbuds from the case
generated_testcases.expected: When the LEFT earbud is inserted into the case, call audio continues through the RIGHT earbud without dropping the call. The call remains active. Poly Studio Mobile app shows partial connection (Right earbud connected). When the RIGHT earbud is also inserted, the call audio routes to the phone's earpiece/speaker. When both earbuds are removed, they reconnect and call audio returns to the earbuds.

generated_testcases.title: TC-BUD-DISCONNECT-005: Poly Studio Mobile app UI reflects partial disconnect state correctly
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC] → navigate to Device screen
2. Verify both earbuds show as connected (e.g., battery icons for left and right)
3. Place the LEFT earbud into the charging case
4. Observe the Device screen in the app — check battery indicators, connection icons, and any status text
5. Navigate to Audio Settings → verify settings are still accessible
6. Navigate back to Device screen
7. Remove the LEFT earbud from the case
generated_testcases.expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app correctly updates to show only the RIGHT earbud as connected. The LEFT earbud battery indicator shows 'In case' or 'Disconnected' or the battery icon is grayed out. Audio Settings remain accessible and functional for the connected RIGHT earbud. When the LEFT earbud is removed, the app updates to show both earbuds connected again.

generated_testcases.title: TC-BUD-DISCONNECT-006: Rapid insertion/removal cycle of one earbud
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC] → confirm both earbuds connected
2. Start media playback
3. Place the LEFT earbud into the charging case → wait 2 seconds → remove it
4. Immediately place the LEFT earbud back into the case → wait 2 seconds → remove it
5. Repeat steps 3-4 for a total of 5 rapid cycles
6. After the final removal, observe connection status and audio
generated_testcases.expected: Each insertion causes only the LEFT earbud to disconnect. Each removal causes the LEFT earbud to reconnect. The RIGHT earbud remains continuously connected and playing audio throughout all cycles. After the final cycle, both earbuds are connected and audio plays from both. No crash, freeze, or permanent disconnect occurs in the Poly Studio Mobile app.

generated_testcases.title: TC-BUD-DISCONNECT-007: Earbud insertion during firmware update
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC] → navigate to Settings → Firmware Update
2. If an update is available, start the firmware update process
3. During the firmware update, place the LEFT earbud into the charging case
4. Observe firmware update progress in the app
5. Observe connection status
6. Remove the LEFT earbud from the case after 10 seconds
7. Wait for firmware update to complete
generated_testcases.expected: The firmware update should not fail or stall when one earbud is inserted into the case. The update may pause or continue depending on design, but should not result in a corrupted update or bricked earbuds. When the LEFT earbud is removed, it should reconnect and the firmware update should complete successfully on both earbuds. The app should display appropriate status messages.

generated_testcases.title: TC-BUD-DISCONNECT-008: Earbud insertion while Transparency Mode settings are being adjusted
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC] → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
2. Set Environment Surround level to 75
3. Switch to Speech sub-setting and set Free level to 40
4. While on the Transparency Mode screen, place the LEFT earbud into the charging case
5. Observe the slider values on the screen
6. Switch between Environment and Speech sub-settings
7. Remove the LEFT earbud from the case
8. Verify both slider values
generated_testcases.expected: When the LEFT earbud is inserted, the Transparency Mode screen remains accessible. The Surround level (75) and Free level (40) values persist and do not reset. Switching between Environment and Speech sub-settings shows the correct previously set values. After removing the LEFT earbud, both values remain unchanged at 75 and 40 respectively.

generated_testcases.title: TC-BUD-DISCONNECT-009: Earbud insertion during ANC level adjustment
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC] → Audio Settings → ANC
2. Set ANC Level slider to 60
3. While on the ANC screen, place the RIGHT earbud into the charging case
4. Observe the ANC Level slider value
5. Adjust ANC Level to 80 while one earbud is in the case
6. Remove the RIGHT earbud from the case
7. Verify ANC Level value
generated_testcases.expected: The ANC Level slider remains visible and adjustable when one earbud is in the case. The value persists at 60 after insertion. Changing to 80 while one earbud is in the case is accepted. After removing the RIGHT earbud, the ANC Level remains at 80. The setting applies to the connected earbud.

generated_testcases.title: TC-BUD-DISCONNECT-010: Voyager Free 20 — single earbud insertion into case
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 20] → confirm both earbuds are connected
2. Start media playback
3. Place the LEFT earbud into the charging case and close the lid
4. Observe connection status in Poly Studio Mobile app → Device screen
5. Observe audio output from the RIGHT earbud
6. Place the RIGHT earbud into the case as well
7. Remove both earbuds from the case
generated_testcases.expected: Only the LEFT earbud disconnects when inserted. The RIGHT earbud remains connected and audio continues through it. Poly Studio Mobile app shows partial connection state. When both earbuds are in the case, audio stops and device shows as disconnected. When both are removed, they reconnect automatically.
